conversation_messages.compact_text: Initial deployment complete. Legal SoF Platform MVP deployed to GenSpark sandbox. Frontend: https://5175-iuy1pmhbm169wep8nogbw-b32ec7bb.sandbox.novita.ai | Backend: https://8000-iuy1pmhbm169wep8nogbw-b32ec7bb.sandbox.novita.ai | Login: admin@example.com / admin123. Stack: React+TypeScript+Tailwind, FastAPI, SQLite (10 tables), JWT auth. Features: Dashboard, Matter Management, Audit Logs. 6 commits, 31 Python files (1,635 LOC), 10 TypeScript files, 6 docs (3,000+ lines). Status: Operational.
Login redirect loop - can't access app. Remove login for now, need to build features first. Will add authentication later.

Authentication disabled. Modified App.tsx routes and Layout to remove login requirement. All pages now directly accessible. Access: https://5175-iuy1pmhbm169wep8nogbw-b32ec7bb.sandbox.novita.ai (no login required). Dev mode badge shows 'No Auth'. Commit: 0622e30.

Dashboard showing blank page. Fixed by removing useAuthStore dependency from DashboardPage.tsx. Changed welcome message from user?.full_name to static 'Welcome to Legal SoF Platform'. Frontend restarted with cache cleared. Commit: e88e9ac. Verify at sandbox URL.

Implemented full Matter Detail page with 7 functional tabs: Overview, Questionnaire (4 SOF sources: Business Sale £2.5M, Savings £1.2M, Loan £1.5M, Dividends with completion %), Documents (5 samples with verification status), Funds Chain (7 events timeline, £3.7M traced of £5.2M target, £1.5M shortfall), Checks (4 automated validations: Amount Consistency HIGH, Date Alignment, Identity Passed, Document Completeness), Notes, Audit Trail. Mock data aligned to UK AML SOF requirements. Commit: ba25262.

Extract Transaction Review tool from backup repo (PatAgora/due-diligence-app, tag: v2.0-ai-working-backup). Integrate transaction review rules and alerts per-matter into new app. Frontend: DueDiligenceFrontend/src/components/Transaction*.jsx | Backend: DueDiligenceBackend/Transaction Review/app.py | DB: scrutinise_workflow.db (alerts, transactions tables) | AI: OpenAI GPT-4 question generation. Format to match new app style.

Downloaded backup from GitHub (https://github.com/PatAgora/due-diligence-app/archive/refs/tags/v2.0-ai-working-backup.zip) to /home/user/due-diligence-backup.zip and extracted. Found 9 Transaction*.jsx files in DueDiligenceFrontend/src/components: TransactionAI, TransactionAIRationale, TransactionAlerts, TransactionDashboard, TransactionExplore, TransactionReviewAdmin, TransactionReviewConfig, TransactionReviewDataIngest, TransactionReviewWrapper. Backend found at DueDiligenceBackend/Transaction Review/app.py.

Created Transaction Review backend models: Transaction (id, matter_id FK, amount, currency, date, description, source/destination, type, risk_score, metadata, timestamps), TransactionAlert (id, transaction_id FK, alert_type, severity, description, rule_id, status, reviewed_by, resolved_at, timestamps), CountryRisk (country_code, risk_level, last_updated), KYCProfile (id, matter_id FK, entity_name, verification_level, risk_flags, last_checked), TransactionConfig (id, matter_id FK, cash_limit, alert_threshold_high/medium, enabled_rules JSON, auto_flag_rules JSON, timestamps). Updated backend/app/models/__init__.py to export new models. Status: Backend models complete, API endpoints pending.

Current Status: ✅ Backend transaction models created and integrated | ✅ Authentication removed, app accessible | ✅ Frontend running with 7 Matter Detail tabs | ✅ Docs: TRANSACTION_REVIEW_INTEGRATION.md, SANDBOX_DEPLOYMENT.md | 🔄 In Progress: Transaction API endpoints, frontend TransactionReview tab/component, CSV upload & ingest, alert dashboard, config UI | ⏳ Pending: API implementation, ingest pipeline, per-matter rule application, AI integration hookup, end-to-end testing. Next: Implement API endpoints → Build frontend tab → Wire ingest → Test → Commit.

key_achievements: MVP deployed to GenSpark sandbox with full stack
7-tab Matter Detail page with SOF mock data
Transaction Review models integrated from backup
